title: coleus prostratus
intro: Coleus prostratus, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a plant species belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae, native to the tropical regions of India and Sri Lanka. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Coleus prostratus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Coleus prostratus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from mild to severe.
